reviews.comment:
Buena atención.  Siempre hay mucha gente y ademas son muy lerdos para atender. Fui pocas veces porque hay que esperar mucho

(Translated by Google)
The service was good. However, it's always very busy and the service is very slow. I've only been a few times because of the long wait.

reviews.comment:
Fui solo dos veces, siempre hay mucha gente y hay que esperar mucho para Ser atendido y no me gusta esperar. La atención es muy buena, no voy porque no soy paciente....

(Translated by Google)
I've only been twice; it's always crowded and the wait is long, and I don't like waiting. The service is very good, though; I don't go because I'm not patient.
